song.title: Grace Greater Then Our Sin_Bart Millard
song.lyrics:
. Intro: . G C G C [V1] . G D G 1) Marvelous grace of our loving God . D G C G Grace that exceeds our sin and our guilt . G D Em Yonder on Calvary's mount outpoured . Am7 G D G There where the blood of the lamb was split
[C] Chorus . G C G Grace, grace, God's grace . D G Grace that will pardon and cleanse within . G C G Grace, grace, God's grace . Am7 G D G Grace that is greater than all our sin
[V2] . G D G 2) Marvelous, infinite, matchless grace . D G C G Freely bestowed on all who believe . G D Em You who are longing to see his face . Am7 G D G Will you this moment His Grace re - ceive
[E] .D Em . Am7 G D G C G C D G Grace that is great than all our sin
